inputs.label: Mass (kg)
inputs.businessContext: The mass of the oscillating body in kilograms.

businessContext_i18n.en: The mass of the oscillating body in kilograms.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Salınım yapan cismin kilogram cinsinden kütlesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Masse des schwingenden Körpers in Kilogramm.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Masse du corps oscillant en kilogrammes.
businessContext_i18n.es: Masa del cuerpo oscilante en kilogramos.

inputs.label: Spring Stiffness (N/m)
inputs.businessContext: The stiffness of the spring or structural element in Newtons per meter.

businessContext_i18n.en: The stiffness of the spring or structural element in Newtons per meter.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yayın veya yapısal elemanın metre başına Newton cinsinden sertliği.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Steifigkeit der Feder oder des Strukturelements in Newton pro Meter.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Raideur du ressort ou de l'élément structurel en Newtons par mètre.
businessContext_i18n.es: Rigidez del resorte o elemento estructural en Newtons por metro.

inputs.label: Damping Ratio (ζ)
inputs.businessContext: The damping ratio ζ = c/(2√(mk)), typically between 0 and 1.

businessContext_i18n.en: The damping ratio ζ = c/(2√(mk)), typically between 0 and 1.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sönüm oranı ζ = c/(2√(mk)), tipik olarak 0 ile 1 arasında.
businessContext_i18n.de: Das Dämpfungsverhältnis ζ = c/(2√(mk)), typischerweise zwischen 0 und 1.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coefficient d'amortissement ζ = c/(2√(mk)), généralement entre 0 et 1.
businessContext_i18n.es: Relación de amortiguamiento ζ = c/(2√(mk)), típicamente entre 0 y 1.

inputs.label: Excitation Frequency (Hz)
inputs.businessContext: The frequency of the applied oscillating force or base motion.

businessContext_i18n.en: The frequency of the applied oscillating force or base motion.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Uygulanan salınımlı kuvvetin veya taban hareketinin frekansı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Frequenz der aufgebrachten oszillierenden Kraft oder Basisbewegung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Fréquence de la force oscillante appliquée ou du mouvement de base.
businessContext_i18n.es: Frecuencia de la fuerza oscilante aplicada o movimiento base.
